basic_details.job_title: NII Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Immunology (NII) has officially announced the Senior Research Fellow (Project) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published at https://www.nii.res.in. Candidates who possess an M.Sc. or M.Tech in any area of Life Sciences with at least two years of post M.Sc. experience and have qualified a National Level Examination such as NET/ GATE are eligible to apply. Applications must be submitted via email on or before 17 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. or M.Tech in any area of Life Sciences with minimum two years of post M.Sc. experience, Cleared National Level Examination (NET/GATE etc.)
qualification.details: M.Sc. or M.Tech in any area of Life Sciences with minimum two years of post M.Sc. experience. Candidates should have cleared any National Level Examination Test (NET/GATE etc.).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NII Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NII Senior Research Fellow (Project) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NII Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NII Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NII Senior Research Fellow (Project) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. or M.Tech degree in any area of Life Sciences with at least two years of post-M.Sc. experience and have cleared a National Level Examination (NET/GATE etc.).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow (Project) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 42,000/- plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Senior Research Fellow (Project) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 100/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NII Senior Research Fellow (Project) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The appointment will be on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the National Institute of Immunology located?
faq.answer: The National Institute of Immunology is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.
